channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Former Tesla president shares the secret to success he learned from his former boss, Elon Musk: He demands to only work with world-class talent
item.description: Elon Musk's success at Tesla and SpaceX came from hiring people with an unusual mix of four qualities, according to a former president.

item.title: I have spent 25 years studying loneliness. AI is about to make it much worse
item.description: A leading existential psychologist doubts that big tech's bet on AI companions is wise during America's social disconnection crisis.

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO filing just told us what business he is betting on for the future and it is not rockets
item.description: SpaceX has reinvented itself from a commercial space pioneer to an AI-centric player facing intense competition.

item.title: Startup founder reached $200 million ARR after leaving YouTube fame and facing bankruptcy
item.description: Fanvue CEO Joel Morris built a fast-growing creator economy platform after giving up a teenage YouTube fortune and enduring financial struggles.
